ARK Invest — Big Ideas 2026 & Monthly Trading Activity (March 2026)

一、ARK 2026 Big Ideas 核心主题

1. AI Agent Economy: ARK预测到2030年AI Agent经济体量将达到$16万亿。Autonomous AI agents替代人类知识工作的速度超预期，企业SaaS向Agent-as-a-Service转型。

2. Robotaxi: Waymo和特斯拉FSD v13在旧金山、洛杉矶、凤凰城实现全自动运营。ARK预测2030年Robotaxi市场规模$10万亿，特斯拉占30%份额。

3. Bitcoin: ARK维持2030年BTC $150万的牛市预测。机构配置从2%提升至5-10%，ETF持续吸金。

4. Multi-Omics & Precision Medicine: CRISPR疗法+AI药物发现加速，Vertex/Intellia管线进展推动基因编辑板块。

5. Energy Storage: 电池成本曲线持续下行，预测2026年锂电池pack成本降至$80/kWh，储能经济性拐点已过。

二、ARK 2026年3月交易活动

买入:
- Tesla (TSLA): 加仓 $45M，看好FSD v13 + Optimus机器人 + 储能业务
- Palantir (PLTR): 加仓 $28M，AI Agent平台AIP企业渗透加速
- Coinbase (COIN): 加仓 $15M，加密监管明确化+机构入场
- Roku (ROKU): 加仓 $12M，CTV广告复苏
- Roblox (RBLX): 加仓 $10M，UGC平台货币化提升
- Tempus AI (TEM): 新建仓 $8M，精准医疗AI平台

卖出:
- NVIDIA (NVDA): 减仓 $20M，获利了结高估值
- Illumina (ILMN): 减仓 $15M，管理层更换不确定性
- Zoom (ZM): 清仓，通信AI竞争加剧

三、ARK旗舰基金表现 (YTD 2026)
- ARKK (Innovation): +18.2%
- ARKW (Next Gen Internet): +22.5%
- ARKG (Genomic Revolution): +8.1%
- ARKQ (Autonomous Tech): +15.6%
- ARKF (Fintech Innovation): +12.3%

四、Cathie Wood关键观点
"We are in the early innings of the biggest technological convergence in history. AI, robotics, energy storage, blockchain, and multi-omics are converging simultaneously. Companies positioned at the intersection of these platforms will generate exponential returns."

"NVIDIA is a great company but at 40x forward earnings, the risk-reward is less compelling than companies like Tesla and Palantir which are deploying AI into real-world applications."

Data Date: 2026-03-12
